skills.name: QuickNote
skills.description: Quickly save notes to a markdown file. Adds /note slash command.
skills.author: Stuart Community

source.content:
import os
from datetime import datetime
from core.plugin_manager import StuartPlugin
from typing import Dict, Any

class QuickNotePlugin(StuartPlugin):
    name = "QuickNote"
    version = "1.0.0"
    description = "Save quick notes to a markdown file."

    def on_load(self, context: Dict[str, Any]):
        slash = context.get('slash_router')
        if slash:
            slash.register_command('/note', self._cmd_note, 'Save a quick note: /note <text>')
        logger = context.get('logger')
        if logger:
            logger.info('QuickNotePlugin loaded.')

    def _cmd_note(self, args: str) -> str:
        if not args.strip():
            return 'Please provide note text: `/note <your note>`'
        notes_path = os.path.join('data', 'notes.md')
        os.makedirs('data', exist_ok=True)
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
        entry = f'\n## {timestamp}\n{args.strip()}\n'
        with open(notes_path, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(entry)
        return f'\U0001f4dd Note saved to `{notes_path}`.'
